mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seleniumGroup WHERE seleniumGroupParentPath = #{parentPath} ORDER BY seleniumGroupFullPath ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE seleniumGroup SET seleniumGroupFullPath = #{seleniumGroupFullPath}, seleniumGroupParentPath = #{seleniumGroupParentPath}, seleniumGroupName = #{seleniumGroupName} WHERE seleniumGroupFullPath = #{ordSeleniumGroupFullPath};
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seleniumGroup WHERE seleniumGroupFullPath = #{seleniumGroupFullPath} OR seleniumGroupFullPath Like #{seleniumGroupParentPath};
